sections.paragraph:
-(I.) i.q. كنّ to cover, to protect, to defend (compare נָּנַן, جَنَّ). Imper. with ה parag. כַּנָּה protect, Psa 80:16: [This meaning is rejected in Thes.], where others less suitably understand a plant, a shoot (compare כֵּן Dan 11:7). [See כַּנָּה .]

[Derivatives, כֵּן 2 and 3, כַּכָּה, כִּנָּם.]

[Also perhaps to nip, to pinch, Gr. κνάω, etc.; hence כִּנִּים. See Thes.]

(II.) i.q. כּוּן. See כֵּן No. II .-From No. II. is-
